categories.label: Spinning Gyrodynes (in-game)
categories.description: Points scored each Production Phase from spinning gyrodynes (face value + row bonus)

categories.label: Online Transmitters (in-game)
categories.description: Points scored each Production Phase from flipped transmitter tiles

categories.label: Technology & Action Points (in-game)
categories.description: Points scored during Action/Production Phases from patents, exploration bonuses, gate runs, and construction awards

categories.label: Purple Patent End-Game Bonuses
categories.description: End-of-game points from purple technology patents

categories.label: Goal Tile Points
categories.description: Points from achieving end-of-game goal tile conditions, including purchased bonuses

categories.label: Undeveloped Pulsars
categories.description: 1 point per claimed pulsar with no gyrodyne or a gyrodyne still under construction

categories.label: Unused Gyrodyne Tiles
categories.description: 1 point per gyrodyne tile still under construction or not yet placed on a pulsar

categories.label: Engineering Cube Pairs
categories.description: 1 point per pair of leftover engineering cubes (a single cube scores nothing)

categories.label: Initiative Track Position
categories.description: 7 points for 1st, 4 for 2nd, 2 for 3rd (4-player); no 3rd in 3-player

categories.label: Station Points
categories.description: Points based on total stations in planetary systems (up to 50 for 13 stations, +3 per station beyond 13)
